name: lookup_ls_sonicstar_combined_artistName_and_genre
note: Expected divergence: vanilla 2.2.0 has no ls_sonicstar. This scenario exercises the multi-criterion AND path: the TS Mongo filter combines both fields, and rust-overlay's storage layer composes them via the SonicstarFilter introduced in step 4 (design call A). Live parity via tests/sonicstar_live_parity.rs (step 10).
